page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 processor. This configuration features 8 physical cores and 8 vCPUs running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz, supported by a 33 MB L3 cache. The hardware profile includes 64.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and a bundled 1919 GB local SSD storage volume. Network connectivity is established with a baseline bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates mixed performance characteristics. The Intel Xeon processor delivers weak single-core and multi-core CPU performance in stress-ng and Geekbench tests, placing in the bottom 25 percent. Similarly, single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression rates are positioned in the lower tiers. However, the system achieves average performance in large-block memory bandwidth read and write operations, as well as in Passmark CPU extended instructions tests. Redis SET operations perform at an average level, processing 6.06 million operations per second, while static web serving throughput remains in the bottom 25 percent.

The inclusion of a substantial 1919 GB local SSD combined with 64.0 GB of RAM offers high resource density for storage-heavy workloads. While the processing unit exhibits lower raw compute speeds compared to newer generations, the qualitative cost efficiency of this instance is driven by its high local storage capacity and memory allocation relative to the vCPU count. This makes it a viable option for workloads that require significant local storage and memory but do not demand intensive CPU processing.

Appropriate workloads for the ecs.i2.2xlarge include local database hosting, caching layers such as Redis, and general-purpose storage-intensive applications that benefit from dedicated physical cores and direct-attached SSD storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.2xlarge is an x86_64 server instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, 64.0 GB of RAM, and a bundled 1919 GB local SSD. It operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core and multi-core CPU capabilities, placing in the bottom 25 percent for stress-ng and Geekbench tests. However, the instance maintains average performance in large-block memory read/write operations and Redis SET operations, processing 6.06 million operations per second. The high local storage capacity and 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio provide strong resource density for storage-centric applications. This server is best suited for database hosting, caching layers, and storage-intensive workloads that do not require high-performance compute capabilities.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2.2xlarge is an x86_64 server with 8 Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 1919 GB local SSD, offering average Redis performance for storage-intensive workloads.

tagline: An x86_64 server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 64 GB of RAM, and a high-capacity 1.9 TB local SSD.
